equipBonuses.name: Executioner's Pursuit
equipBonuses.description: When you kill an enemy, there is a 20% chance you will teleport to a nearby enemy. Can only occur once every 10 seconds.

equipBonuses.name: Bone Armor
equipBonuses.description: When you kill an enemy, gain 2% of your Maximum Hit Points as a shield for 10 seconds. (Max 5 stacks)

equipBonuses.name: Challenger's Might
equipBonuses.description: When in combat with only one enemy, your Power is increased by 5000.

equipBonuses.name: Berserker's Might
equipBonuses.description: For the first minute you are in combat, you will gain 400 Power every 5 seconds. If you stay in combat for longer than one minute, you will lose 450 Power every 5 seconds, to a total loss of 4200 Power.
